zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Salway于1240年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾卡諾可。她于1260年与William de Kynnardsleye在英国英格兰斯塔福爾武托希特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世在英国英格兰斯塔福爾武托希特。

nameMeanings.name: Salway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Somerset and Devon): from the Middle English personal name Salewi, Selawy, probably from Old English Sǣlwīg (sǣl ‘happiness, prosperity’ + wīg ‘battle’). The name may sometimes have been confused with Selwyn .

variants.name: Selway
meanings: English (Somerset and Devon): variant of   Salway  .

variants.name: Soloway
meanings: Americanized form of Jewish, Ukrainian, or Belorussian   Solovey   ‘nightingale’.

variants.name: Selwyn
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Selewin(e) (Old English Selewine, perhaps from sele ‘hall’ or sǣl ‘happiness, prosperity’ + wine ‘friend’).

of Norman origin, perhaps from the Middle English and Old French personal name Selvein, Silvein (from Latin Silvanus, an adjective from silva ‘woodland’), with vocalization of /v/ to /w/, possibly through influence of the name above. In Anglo-Norman usage both Selvein and Silvester were sometimes Latinized as Salvagius ‘wild, savage’ (see Sylvester and Savage ), though whether the vernacular surnames were ever interchangeable is a question for further research.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Salway was born in 1240, in Cannock, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. She married William de Kynnardsleye in 1260, in Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Salway est née en 1240, à Cannock, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé William de Kynnardsleye en 1260, à Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée à Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Salway wurde 1240 in Cannock, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1260 in Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom William de Kynnardsleye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb in Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Salway è nata il nel 1240 nel Cannock, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato William de Kynnardsleye nel 1260, nel Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Salwayは1240年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアカノックで生まれた。1260年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウットオクセターでWilliam de Kynnardsleyeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウットオクセターで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Salway(은)는 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 캔옥크에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 우토세터에서 William de Kynnardsleye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 우토세터에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Salway родилась в 1240 г. в местности каннокк, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Kynnardsleye в 1260 г. в местности уттоксетир, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в местности уттоксетир, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
